meta.title: America's new stealth fighter has a range of over 2,200 miles?!
meta.description:
Thanks to Air Force Chief of Staff General David Allvin, we just learned a few more details about America’s new stealth fighter, the F-47, and the AI-controlled drone wingmen being tested to fly alongside it. 

Let's run through what we've learned.
